title: TITLE 11CONSOLIDATED PUBLIC RETIREMENT SYSTEMS
doc_html:
TITLE 11

CONSOLIDATED PUBLIC RETIREMENT SYSTEMS

SUBTITLE I.  GENERAL AND PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS

CHAPTER 1.  PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS

§1.  Short title

This Title shall be known as the "Louisiana Public Retirement Law".

Acts 1988, No. 81, §2, eff. July 1, 1989.
